nasb.text: Now it took place in the days of Ahasuerus, the Ahasuerus who reigned from India to Ethiopia over 127 provinces,

esv.text: Now in the days of Ahasuerus, the Ahasuerus who reigned from India to Ethiopia over 127 provinces,

cnv.text: 亞哈隨魯在位的時候，他統治從印度到古實共一百二十七省。

ccb.text: 亚哈随鲁在位期间，统治从印度到古实的一百二十七个省。
